summary: Added extension keyword_overrides support to /task command step 4. Rewrote task.md with a 5-step precedence chain (4a meta keywords, 4b extension keyword scanning with jq patterns, 4c project default, 4d hardcoded keyword table, 4e alias remapping). Synced to core extension copy. Documented keyword_overrides schema in extension-development.md. Updated CLAUDE.md merge source and live CLAUDE.md with updated precedence text and Extension Task Types note.

artifacts.summary: 3-phase implementation summary: task.md step 4 rewrite, extension-development.md docs, CLAUDE.md merge source update
